name: Relevance AI
description: No-code platform for creating and deploying customer-facing AI agents and multi-agent teams. Features drag-and-drop workflow builder with Invent feature, pre-built templates, RAG integration, and seamless deployment via live chat or embedded widgets.
capabilities: No-code agent builder with natural language description
pricing: Tiered based on agent volume and runtime hours
notes: Australian startup. Secured significant funding to build 'definitive home of the AI workforce.' Focuses on customer engagement and internal workflow automation. Recent 2026 enhancements include live chat commands, slide builder, saved prompts.
